positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a celestial creature, perhaps a mythical fox or phoenix, in mid-flight, rendered with thick, clean silhouettes and sharp, vibrant linework. The composition is centered, featuring the creature spiraling upward against a deep midnight blue background speckled with constellations of glowing gold and teal. Incorporate stylized cosmic elements like rings, nebulae patterns, and abstract star bursts, creating a sense of dynamic movement and magical grandeur. The overall style should be Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with modern graphic design, suitable for screen printing on dark fabrics. High contrast, vivid jewel tones (sapphire, amethyst, emerald), clean vector-like quality, central focal point.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, low resolution, gradient, photographic, photorealistic, cluttered, messy, grain
